Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Recipes kids can make

Other · asked by user [] · 2008-05-09 · 8 answers
Dear friends

I am looking for recipes that kids can make

Please let me know if you have any

they are to help families and their children participate in festivals such as Janmasthami

thank you

Antony
user [18] · 2008-05-09
all kinds of salads
simply wonderful
roll puris
user [40] · 2008-05-10
OK great suggestions

I think salads are a good for kids, no heat, I hadnt thought of that

Anyone else please you parents and cooks
user [19] · 2008-05-15
coconut with condensed milk!
user [40] · 2008-05-16
Good on you mate

what do you cal it does it have a name so I can look up a recipe

antony
user [19] · 2008-05-16
hmmm the recipe is coconuts and condensed milk. you mix them and make balls.
user [40] · 2008-05-17
do you cook em or fridge em Abhiram
They sound great

I found a couple of recipes on the web

like this one where you cook them till brown

http://www.cookinghousewives.com/print/recipe/coconutballs.html

Heres a fridge one

http://www.recipezaar.com/76998 (it says 51% the calorie are from fat, should call em fat balls)

what do you do with your please, its best to find out from someone with direct experience, or is your ditect experience in eating them : )

I saw one with nuts and raisins and orange peel, imagine that?
user [19] · 2008-05-17
yes, if you bake them a little they are tastier.

they are very easy to make. you mix the two ingredients until they are consistent enough to make balls.
then wash your hands and dry them otherwise it will be very difficult to make balls.
option 1. make the balls and put a small nut on over each one.
option2 . sometimes i add marmalede instead of the nut since sweets are never sweet enough for me. :)
option 3. add an additional layer of fresh coconut after the ball is ready

i cant think of anything easier than this for kids.
user [40] · 2008-05-17
Dont worry this is fantastic, I appreciate your input. If only the others here were as sweet as you : )

come on you other lot, help the children
